ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the energy consumption entry */,
  "cons_12m" REAL /* Annual energy consumption for the previous 12 months */,
  "cons_gas_12m" REAL /* Gas consumption for the previous 12 months */,
  "date_activ" TEXT /* Activation date of the energy account */,
  "date_end" TEXT /* End date of the energy account */,
  "date_modif_prod" TEXT /* Last modification date of the product */,
  "date_renewal" TEXT /* Renewal date of the energy product */,
  "forecast_cons_12m" REAL /* Forecasted energy consumption for the next 12 months */,
  "forecast_cons_year" REAL /* Forecasted energy consumption for the year */,
  "forecast_meter_rent_12m" REAL /* Forecasted rental cost of the meter for the next 12 months */,
  "energy_product_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the energy product */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the client */,
  "seasonal_factor" REAL /* Seasonal factor applied to the energy consumption */,
  "weather_station_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the weather station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_analysis" (
  "id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the customer analysis entry */,
  "imp_cons" REAL /* Impact of consumption for the customer */,
  "margin_net_pow_ele" REAL /* Net margin from power and electricity services */,
  "nb_prod_act" INTEGER /* Number of active products for the customer */,
  "net_margin" REAL /* Net margin calculated from operations */,
  "pow_max" REAL /* Maximum power consumption */,
  "churn" INTEGER /* Churn status of the customer (1 for churned, 0 for active) */,
  "date_actv" TEXT /* Activation date of the customer account */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the analysis */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the analysis */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the client */,
  "market_segment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the market segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing_models" (
  "id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the pricing model entry */,
  "forecast_price_energy_p1" REAL /* Forecasted price for energy product 1 */,
  "forecast_price_energy_p2" REAL /* Forecasted price for energy product 2 */,
  "forecast_price_pow_p1" REAL /* Forecasted price for power product 1 */,
  "mean_price_p1_var" REAL /* Mean price variability for energy product 1 */,
  "mean_price_p2_var" REAL /* Mean price variability for energy product 2 */,
  "mean_price_p3_var" REAL /* Mean price variability for energy product 3 */,
  "mean_price_p1_fix" REAL /* Fixed mean price for energy product 1 */,
  "mean_price_p2_fix" REAL /* Fixed mean price for energy product 2 */,
  "mean_price_p3_fix" REAL /* Fixed mean price for energy product 3 */,
  "pricing_strategy_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the pricing strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_products" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the energy product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the energy product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the energy product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "client_type" TEXT /* Type of client (residential or commercial) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the client */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the client */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the client */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_segments" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the market segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the market segment */,
  "segment_description" TEXT /* Description of the market segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing_strategies" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the pricing strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the pricing strategy */,
  "strategy_description" TEXT /* Description of the pricing strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
